ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BLOOD_BANK.title: Blood Bank
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BLOOD_BANK.description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], if you would heal for more HP than your maximum, gain [blue]{GoldPerHp}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] for each excess HP.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BLOOD_BANK.flavor: Gold seems to materialize out of nothingness as this is filled.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BLOODY_IDOL.flavor: The idol now weeps a constant stream of blood.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-BLOODY_IDOL.title: Bloody Idol
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-CULTIST_HEADPIECE.title: Cultist Headpiece
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-ENCHIRIDION.description: At the start of each combat, add a random Power to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-ENCHIRIDION.flavor: The legendary journal of an ancient lich.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-ENCHIRIDION.title: Enchiridion
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FACE_OF_CLERIC.descripti: At the end of combat, gain [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] Max HP.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-FACE_OF_CLERIC.title: Face of Cleric
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-GOLDEN_IDOL.flavor: Made of solid gold, you feel richer just holding it.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-GOLDEN_IDOL.title: Golden Idol
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-GREMLIN_VISAGE.title: Gremlin Visage
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MARK_OF_THE_BLOOM.flavor: In the Beyond, thoughts and reality are one.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MARK_OF_THE_BLOOM.title: Mark of the Bloom
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MUTAGENIC_STRENGTH.descr: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MUTAGENIC_STRENGTH.flavo: "The results seem fleeting, triggering when the subject is in danger." - Unknown
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-MUTAGENIC_STRENGTH.title: Mutagenic Strength
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NECRONOMICON.description: Upon pickup, receive [red]Necronomicurse[/red]. The first time each turn you play an Attack that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more, it is played an extra time.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NECRONOMICON.flavor: Only a fool would try and harness this evil power. At night your dreams are haunted by images of the book devouring your mind.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NECRONOMICON.title: Necronomicon
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NILRYS_CODEX.description: At the end of your turn, you may shuffle [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random cards into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NILRYS_CODEX.flavor: Crafted by the infamous game master himself. Said to expand one's mind.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NILRYS_CODEX.title: Nilry's Codex
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NLOTHS_GIFT.description: Triple the chance of finding [gold]Rare[/gold] cards from combat rewards.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NLOTHS_GIFT.flavor: The strange gift from N'loth. Whenever you try and unwrap it, another wrapped box of the same size lies within.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NLOTHS_GIFT.title: N'loth's Gift
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NLOTHS_HUNGRY_FACE.descr: The next Treasure Chest you open is [red]empty[/red].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-NLOTHS_HUNGRY_FACE.title: N'loth's Hungry Face
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-ODD_MUSHROOM.description: When [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], take [blue]25%[/blue] more attack damage rather than [blue]50%[/blue].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-ODD_MUSHROOM.flavor: "After consuming trichella parastius I felt larger and less... susceptible." - Ranwid
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-ODD_MUSHROOM.title: Odd Mushroom
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SPIRIT_POOP.flavor: The charred remains of your offering to the spirits.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SPIRIT_POOP.title: Spirit Poop
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SSSERPENT_HEAD.descripti: Whenever you enter a [gold]?[/gold] room, gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SSSERPENT_HEAD.flavor: The most fulfilling of lives is that in which you can buy anything!
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-SSSERPENT_HEAD.title: Ssserpent Head
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WARPED_TONGS.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] for the rest of combat.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WARPED_TONGS.flavor: The cursed tongs emit a strong desire to return to where they were stolen from.
ACTSFROMTHEPAST-WARPED_TONGS.title: Warped Tongs
